Changelog

rrricanesdata 0.2.1 (2019-07-01)

NEW FEATURES

  • Add cyclone data for Jun, 2019

rrricanesdata 0.2.0 (2019-06-17)

NEW FEATURES

  • Add AL012019 (May, 2019)

rrricanesdata 0.1.7 (2018-12-01)

NEW FEATURES

  • Added cyclones for Nov., 2018

NEW FEATURES
